p1.summary: Added the required CP00-042 manifest, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection artifacts with the S14 production_ready flag.

p2.summary: Hardened the RP00 validator so missing construction-inspection.json records an explicit construction inspection error instead of only relying on the generic evidence missing check.

p3.summary: Result field inventory order remains harmless because validators assert field presence and fixture/live output key order matches.
Policy membership and generic truthy claim rejection cover the sampled claim variants consistently with prior subphases.

raw_cli_result_excerpt:
## CP00-042 Review — RP00.P02.M07.S14 Test And Golden Case Set Review-required routing

Verified against the actual file state: contract validator passes and all 1623 service tests pass. Code logic is correct and consistent with the S13→S14 pattern. The one substantive gap is missing closeout-pack evidence backing the `production_ready` flip.
